## Type of change

## Testing
<!-- The whole point of this tool is visual. If you touched rendering or layout, test it in a real Kitty terminal and attach a screenshot. -->
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile plugins/kitty-image/skills/kitty-image/show.py` passes
- [ ] Tested in a real Kitty terminal
- [ ] Screenshot attached (for visual changes)

## Checklist
- [ ] `show.py` stays standard-library-only (Pillow remains the one optional dependency)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased"
- [ ] Updated `SKILL.md` if triggering or behavior changed
